meta.name: Complete Nutrition
meta.description: A modern, bold ecommerce design focused on health and performance. Features high contrast with dark sections interspersed among clean white areas, using bold typography with italic accents for emphasis. Clean grid layouts for products and features.

header.notes: Includes a top ticker announcement bar (dark theme). Features a secondary navigational aid button 'Which product is right for you?' with a pale green background. Navigation links have dropdown chevrons.

footer.description: Plant-based nutrition to help the planet thrive. All products are 100% vegan, designed for low-carbon eating.
footer.notes: Complex footer layout with multiple columns for navigation (Food, Company, Support), a left column for brand mission and a primary CTA. Below the main links is a divider line, country selector, copyright info, and payment icons. The very bottom includes social links and detailed disclaimers in small muted text.

productCard.notes: Bestseller cards feature a pale grey background for the product image, which sits above product title, short description, and key nutritional stats (protein/calories) displayed with icons. 'Bestseller' badge in top left corner with a fire icon. Price is listed at the bottom with price-per-meal context. The 'View product' button is pill-shaped, solid dark.

productGrid.notes: Grid items are uniform in height and width. The layout is clean and spacious.

featuredProducts.heading: Shop our Bestsellers
featuredProducts.notes: Section has a header with a heading, a short subtitle below it, and a 'Shop now' button floated to the right.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: 2-column split, text left, dynamic product imagery right

design.background: Solid pale grey/off-white with a slight gradient or natural lighting effect
design.text: Dark foreground, very large bold display font for headline with an italicized word for emphasis. Small muted text for subtitle.
design.styling: No borders, generous padding. Right side features multiple products arranged diagonally.

content.headline: Bold headline emphasizing speed, nutrition, and completeness.
content.body: Brief statement about expert design and daily convenience.
content.cta: Two pill-shaped buttons: Primary is solid dark, secondary is outlined.

media.description: Dynamic top-down arrangement of various branded food and supplement products (bottles, pouches, bars) arranged diagonally across the right half of the section.

content.specialElements: Star rating component above the headline showing 5 green stars and customer count.

sections.notes: High impact entry point. The use of italic text ('complete') within a bold sans-serif headline is a recurring typographic theme.

sections.name: goals-category

design.text: Dark text for section headers, white text inside the image cards
design.styling: Cards have rounded corners (approx 16px) and feature full-bleed imagery with a subtle dark gradient at the top for text legibility. Arrow icon buttons in bottom left.

content.headline: Heading indicating goal-based shopping, with an italicized action word.
content.body: Short subtitle supporting the goal-oriented approach.

media.description: High-quality lifestyle/product shots relating to specific goals (e.g., pouring a shake, a healthy meal, a snack bar) with warm lighting.

items.title: Goal category name
items.icon: Arrow right in a white circle

sections.notes: Section header aligns with the grid. The cards use visual storytelling rather than just product shots.

sections.name: shop-category
sections.layout: Grid of 6 horizontal pill-shaped cards (2 columns x 3 rows)

design.styling: Cards are pale grey (#f4f4f4), fully rounded pill shape. They contain a small product thumbnail on the left, bold text in the center, and a right arrow in a white circle on the right.

content.headline: Heading for browsing by product type, with italicized word.

media.description: Small isolated product thumbnails representing categories.
media.position: left side of each pill card

sections.notes: Highly functional, easy-to-tap navigation for product categories.

sections.name: benefits
sections.layout: Grid of 6 items (3 columns x 2 rows) centered

design.text: White text, large numbers/bold titles, smaller descriptive text.
design.styling: Centered icons above text. Generous vertical spacing.

content.headline: Section title highlighting brand benefits, centered.

items.icon: Minimal line icons (check, clock, coins, trash, thumb up, hand)
items.title: Short punchy benefit statement
items.subtitle: Brief explanatory sentence

sections.notes: Acts as a strong visual break due to the dark background. Typography is crisp and authoritative.

sections.name: why-it-works
sections.layout: Asymmetric bento grid. One large tall column on the left, and a 2x2 grid of smaller square cards on the right.

design.styling: Cards have rounded corners (~12px) and a pale grey background (#f4f4f4). Left tall card features a large product image. Right cards feature smaller graphical elements.

content.headline: Heading asking why the product works, with italicized emphasis.
content.cta: Top right 'See the science' pill button.

media.description: Left card: Large bottle. Right cards: Macro charts, ingredients laid out cleanly, profile pictures of experts.

content.specialElements: Use of small data visualization blocks (e.g., black square for '35g protein' next to outlined squares) inside the cards.

sections.notes: Effectively breaks down complex nutritional information into scannable, visually interesting chunks.

sections.name: testimonials
sections.layout: Horizontal scrolling carousel of portrait-oriented cards

design.text: White text on the cards, overlaid on images.
design.styling: Cards are tall rectangles with rounded corners. Images are dark and dramatic. Text is situated at the bottom of the card with a slight gradient overlay for legibility.

content.headline: Longer headline about recommendations from experts.

media.description: High contrast, dramatically lit portraits of athletes and influencers holding or consuming the product.

content.specialElements: Blue verification checkmarks next to names. Carousel dots and arrow navigation controls below the grid.

sections.notes: Creates a premium, aspirational feel through the photography style.

sections.name: press
sections.notes: Builds trust through social proof. Another dark section for contrast.

design.styling: Standard product card layout. Images on pale grey backgrounds.

content.headline: Heading 'Shop our Bestsellers' with italicized emphasis.

media.description: Clean product shots on pale grey backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Product cards include small icons for 'protein' and 'kcal' alongside text. Bestseller badge in top left.

sections.name: promotions

design.styling: Cards are large, slightly rounded rectangles with dark photographic backgrounds. Text is top-left aligned, CTA button bottom-left aligned.

content.cta: White pill-shaped buttons with black text ('Shop now').

media.description: Dark, moody photography of products, apparel, and lifestyle usage.

sections.notes: Used for specific offers (free t-shirt, taste guarantee). Visually heavy to draw attention.

sections.name: newsletter
sections.layout: 2 column split: Text on left, form on right.

design.styling: Simple input field and button side-by-side.

content.headline: Call to action to join the community.
content.body: Incentive offer for first order and newsletter benefits.
content.specialElements: Email input field with placeholder text.

sections.notes: Transitions directly into the dark footer.
